action_queue.title: Hedge worst shock (SPX -10% (beta-adj))
action_queue.detail: Current -166.2% of NAV vs hard limit -7.0%. Need $1,273,679 of coverage.
action_queue.hedge_hint: Short ~$12,736,794 SPY notional (1.0x) to absorb -159.2% of NAV in this scenario.
